field_of_view_deg: Top lens: 220 pan/10 tilt, 122 diagonal/105 horizontal/58 vertical optical; Bottom lens: 324 pan/90 tilt, 65 diagonal/56 horizontal/30 vertical optical

power.method: Rechargeable battery (10,400mAh); kit includes 8W solar panel; DC 5V/2A adapter (sold separately); Nano SIM card required for 4G

features: dual-lens pan/tilt battery camera kit with 4G LTE cellular connectivity (Nano SIM required), includes 8W solar panel
top lens 2.8mm wide + bottom lens 6mm tele, both F1.2
no officially confirmed RTSP/ONVIF -- official docs list only 'EZVIZ Cloud Proprietary Protocol'
